Uses of Class
recoder.java.reference.TypeReference

Packages that use TypeReference
Package
Description
de.uka.ilkd.key.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.java.recoderext.adt
This package contains RecodeR Operators which represent algebraic data type functions.
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.proofjava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.parser.schemajava
 
de.uka.ilkd.key.util.removegenerics
 
recoder
This package contains some basic definitions.
recoder.java
This package contains classes that cover the Java programming language.
recoder.java.declaration
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing declarations.
recoder.java.expression.operator
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing operators and operator-like expressions.
recoder.java.reference
Elements of the Java syntax tree representing implicit or explicit (named) references to other program elements.
recoder.kit
This package contains the RECODER transformation framework.
recoder.kit.transformation
This package contains transformation command objects and associated problem reports.
recoder.parser
This package contains the JavaCC generated parser.
recoder.service
This package contains the semantical services of RECODER.

  • Uses of TypeReference in de.uka.ilkd.key.java

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TypeReference
    Recoder2KeYConverter.convert(TypeReference tr)
    convert a recoder TypeReference to a KeY TypeReference (checks dimension and hands it over)
    TypeReference
    SchemaRecoder2KeYConverter.convert(TypeReference tr)
    convert a recoder TypeReference to a KeY TypeReference (checks dimension and hands it over)

    TypeKit.createTypeReference(ConstructorDeclaration decl)
    Factory method that creates a new type reference fitting to the constructor declaration.
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(ProgramFactory f, String qualifiedName)
    Factory method that creates a type reference with prefices (UncollatedReferenceQualifiers) from a qualified name.
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(ProgramFactory f, Type t)
    Factory method that creates a new type reference derived by the name of the given type.
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(ProgramFactory f, Type t, boolean addTypeArgs)
     
    static TypeReference
    TypeKit.createTypeReference(SourceInfo si, Type t, ProgramElement context)
    Factory method that creates a new type reference derived by the name of the given type and tries to minimize its qualification using the given context for the type reference.
    Methods in recoder.kit that return types with arguments of type TypeReference
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getInfluencedReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, String newTypeName, NonTerminalProgramElement context)
    Deprecated.
    still untested.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getRedundantExceptions(SourceInfo si, Throws t)
    Query that returns all redundant exceptions of the specified throws clause.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getRedundantSuperInterfaces(SourceInfo si, TypeDeclaration td)
    Query that returns all redundant super interfaces of the specified type declaration.
    static List<TypeReference>
    TypeKit.getReferences(CrossReferenceSourceInfo xr, Type t, NonTerminalProgramElement root, boolean scanTree)
    Query that retrieves all references to a given type that are contained within the given tree.

    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(ReferencePrefix child, TypeReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsPrefix(TypeReference child, MetaClassReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(ReferencePrefix child, TypeReference parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(TypeReference child, InheritanceSpecification parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index but does not report this.

    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
